Description: Ensure that all Elastic Volume Service (EVS) disks are encrypted to protect data at rest.
Risk: Unencrypted EVS volumes expose sensitive data at rest. If a volume is compromised or improperly accessed, the data can be read without any additional protection.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console.
2. Navigate to Elastic Volume Service.
3. Select the unencrypted volume.
4. Create an encrypted volume from a snapshot of the unencrypted volume.
5. Replace the old volume with the new encrypted volume.

Recommendation.Text: Enable encryption for all EVS volumes using a KMS key.
